register.title: Join the group
register.subtitle: Create your account to start predicting
register.loginLink: Already have an account? Sign in

validation.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 6 characters

auth.rateLimit: Too many attempts, please wait a minute

hero.tagline: Guess the scores. Climb the table. Win.

what.heading: What's it about?
what.desc: Guess the score of each match, earn points, and compete with your group. The best predictor wins the prize.
what.card1Desc: Pick the exact score for each match before it starts.
what.card2Desc: 3 pts exact score · 1 pt correct outcome · 0 pts miss.
what.card3Desc: Check the live leaderboard and chase down your rivals.
what.card4Desc: Top finishers take home surprise prizes at tournament's end.

howItWorks.heading: How it works
howItWorks.step1Desc: Sign up in seconds with your email address. It's free.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Enter your forecast before kick-off for each match.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Follow the live rankings and compete for the top spots.

prizes.heading: Prizes
prizes.sub: The best predictors take home recognition… and something extra.
prizes.firstDesc: Eternal glory and a surprise prize for the champion.
prizes.secondDesc: Finalist pride and a surprise worth celebrating.
prizes.thirdDesc: Coffee for the champion and an unexpected treat.
prizes.note: Prizes are a complete surprise. Join to find out!

footerCta.heading: Ready to compete?
footerCta.sub: Join now and prove your predictions are the best in the group.
footerCta.loginLink: Already have an account? Sign in

confirm.title: Confirm Result
confirm.warning: This cannot be undone once confirmed.

leaderboard.title: Leaderboard
leaderboard.subtitle: Rankings by total points. Exact score predictions earn bonus points.
leaderboard.empty: No predictions have been made yet.
leaderboard.emptyHint: Be the first to submit your predictions!
leaderboard.errorLoad: Failed to load leaderboard. Please try again.
leaderboard.footerOne: {{count}} participant · Click your own row to view your predictions
leaderboard.footerMany: {{count}} participants · Click your own row to view your predictions
